channel.title: stefanbuck/awesome-browser-extensions-for-github Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: stefanbuck/awesome-browser-extensions-for-github Aug 19th, 2020
item.description:
List of browser extensions for GitHub

Sourcegraph

  • Go to definition
  • Find references
  • Powerful code search with regexp matching, diff searches, and other filters
  • Hover tooltips
  • File tree navigation
